title: MCP
description: Look up every published Factory Session MCP tool and its input schema from the installed package MCP contract on a stable static docs route.
openingSummary: This reference lists every published Factory Session MCP tool from the installed @you-agent-factory/api MCP contract so host integrators can look up tool names, descriptions, input schemas, and examples without a live Factory host.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference publishes the package-backed MCP tool inventory for you-agent-factory. Readers can look up every published Factory Session tool from the installed MCP contract, including available descriptions, input-schema embeds, authored or clearly labeled generated examples, stable anchors, and inventory filters.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: An MCP tool name is the published Factory Session tool identity, such as you.factory_session.control. The inventory comes from the installed @you-agent-factory/api/mcp public export, not from a page-local copy of tools. Input schemas are projected from the package contract so hosts can see the structured arguments each tool accepts. Authored examples appear when the package publishes them; otherwise the inventory labels generated examples clearly.

toolInventory.title: Tool Inventory
toolInventory.body: Scan the published MCP tools below. Filter by tool name, description, or lifecycle when those facets are present on a tool. Open a tool card for its input schema and examples, and copy its stable anchor when you need a deep link.
